q.en: What secret does Badger reveal about Toad Hall?
q.zh: 獾透露了蟾蜍府的什么秘密？

options.en: An underground passage from the river bank into the middle of Toad Hall
options.zh: 一条从河岸通到蟾蜍府内部的地下通道

options.en: That the house is built on sand
That the house has no doors

explain.en: Badger says, 'There—is—an—underground—passage... that leads from the river bank... right up into the middle of Toad Hall,' discovered and repaired by Toad's father.
explain.zh: 獾说：“有——一条——地下——通道……从河岸……直通蟾蜍府中央”，是蟾蜍父亲发现并修好的。

q.en: How did Badger learn about the weasels' banquet?
q.zh: 獾是如何得知黄鼠狼的宴会的？

options.en: Otter disguised himself as a sweep and called at the back door
options.zh: 水獭扮成扫烟囱的到后门打探

explain.en: Badger says, 'I got Otter to disguise himself as a sweep and call at the back door with brushes,' learning of the banquet next night.
explain.zh: 獾说：“我让水獭扮成扫烟囱的，扛着刷子到后门”，打听到次夜的宴会。

q.en: According to the plan, where does the secret tunnel come up?
q.zh: 按计划，秘密通道通到什么地方？

options.en: Under the butler's pantry, next to the dining hall
options.zh: 在管家备膳室下方，紧邻餐厅

explain.en: Badger explains the tunnel 'leads right up under the butler's pantry, next to the dining hall!' where the weasels will feast.
explain.zh: 獾解释通道“直通管家备膳室下方，紧挨餐厅！”黄鼠狼将在那里吃喝。

q.en: What does Mole do while disguised as a washerwoman?
q.zh: 鼹鼠扮成洗衣妇做了什么？

options.en: He tricks the stoats into thinking a huge army will attack Toad Hall
options.zh: 他骗鼬兵，说大军即将进攻蟾蜍府

explain.en: Mole tells the sentries a tale of 'a hundred bloodthirsty badgers... Six boatloads of Rats... a picked body of Toads,' sending them into a panic.
explain.zh: 鼹鼠对哨兵编造“上百只嗜血獾……六船河鼠……精锐蟾蜍队”的故事，把它们吓慌了。

q.en: In the glossary, the word 'volatile' (as in 'light and volatile in character') means —
q.zh: 词汇表中，'volatile'（如“性情轻浮善变”）意思是——

options.zh: 无法集中注意力；善变的

explain.en: The glossary defines volatile as 'unable to pay attention or maintain focus on one thing; fickle,' describing Toad's father's view of him.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 volatile 解释为“无法集中注意力或专注于一事；易变的”，正是蟾蜍父亲对他的评价。

q.en: The 'squeaky board in the butler's pantry' is used as —
q.zh: “管家备膳室里那块咯吱响的地板”被用作——

options.en: a clue that confirms the hidden passage's location
options.zh: 证实秘密通道位置的一条线索

explain.en: Toad cries, 'Aha! That squeaky board in the butler's pantry! Now I understand it!' linking the sound to the passage's end.
explain.zh: 蟾蜍叫道：“啊哈！备膳室那块咯吱板！这下我明白了！”把声响和通道尽头联系起来。

q.en: The four animals' plan to retake Toad Hall depends on —
q.zh: 四只动物夺回蟾蜍府的计划依赖于——

options.en: surprise through the secret passage while the weasels feast unarmed
options.zh: 趁黄鼠狼毫无武装地宴饮，从秘道突袭

explain.en: They will 'creep out quietly into the butler's pantry' because the weasels 'will be gathered together in the dining hall... No arms of any sort,' trusting only sentinels.
explain.zh: 他们要“悄悄爬进备膳室”，因为黄鼠狼“都聚在餐厅……没有任何武器”，只信赖哨兵。

q.en: Mole's trick works because the stoats —
q.zh: 鼹鼠的计谋奏效，是因为那些鼬——

options.en: believe the false rumor of an approaching army and grow fearful
options.zh: 相信大军将至的假消息，因而害怕

explain.en: The stoats are 'as nervous and flustered as could be,' sending parties off and calling them back, convinced an attack is near.
explain.zh: 鼬们“紧张慌乱到了极点”，派出又召回队伍，深信袭击将至。

q.en: The author includes Badger's calm leadership to show —
q.zh: 作者写獾沉稳的领导，是为了表明——

options.en: wisdom and steady courage are what true leadership requires
options.zh: 智慧与镇定的勇气才是真正领导所需的品质

options.en: that Mole is the real leader

explain.en: Badger finishes his meal, silences the bickering with one word, and lays out the plan, modeling quiet authority.
explain.zh: 獾吃完饭、一句话镇住争吵、从容布置计划，树立了安静的权威形象。

q.en: The story of the underground passage kept by Toad's father suggests —
q.zh: 蟾蜍父亲留下地下通道的故事，暗示了——

options.en: the value of a father's foresight and trusting true friends
options.zh: 父亲远见与信赖挚友的可贵

explain.en: The father repaired the passage 'in case of trouble' and entrusted it to Badger, showing preparation and faithful friendship across generations.
explain.zh: 父亲为“以备不时之需”修好通道，并托付给獾，体现远见与跨代的真挚友谊。

prompt.en: Badger, Rat, Mole, and Toad each play a part in winning back Toad Hall. Tell about a time a group of people worked together, with different roles, to solve a problem.
prompt.zh: 獾、河鼠、鼹鼠和蟾蜍各司其职，共同夺回蟾蜍府。说说有一次一群人分工合作、解决问题的事。

en: Name the goal and each person's role.
Explain what made the teamwork succeed or fail.
zh: 说出目标以及每个人的角色。
说明这次团队合作成功或失败的原因。
